ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle configuration */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "trim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trim of the vehicle */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engine of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission of the vehicle */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Gas, Diesel, Electric) */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle configuration started production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle configuration ended production */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the vehicle */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the vehicle */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles available in inventory */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle configuration is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_trim_id FOREIGN KEY ("trim_id") REFERENCES trims ("trim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trims" (
  "trim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trim */,
  "trim_name" TEXT /* Name of the trim */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trim */,
  "price_increase" REAL /* Additional cost of the trim */,
  "interior_material" TEXT /* Type of interior material (e.g., Leather, Cloth) */,
  "exterior_features" TEXT /* Additional exterior features (e.g., Alloy wheels, Chrome grille) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine */,
  "cylinder_count" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., Inline, V, Rotary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission */,
  "gear_count" INTEGER /* Number of gears */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Manual, Automatic, CVT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optional feature or package */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the optional feature or package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optional feature or package */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the optional feature or package */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the option (e.g., Exterior, Interior, Safety) */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the option is standard or optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_option_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle configuration */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optional feature or package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_option_map_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES vehicle_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_option_map_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle configuration */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., Exterior, Interior, Close-up) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle configuration */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Brochure, Spec Sheet, User Manual) */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_documents_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, admin, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle configuration */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vehicles available in inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action was performed */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the record */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
